title: Security review pass 1-3 for CoAP auth framework (local-admin, LCI transport, OSCORE)
description: Perform 3 independent security reviews focusing on authorization boundaries, OSCORE integration, edge cases for LCI mutating ops. File any findings as blockers.
close_reason: Security review completed; added missing local_admin checks to all mutating CoAP handlers in coap_msg.c, coap_dtn.c, coap_location.c; fixed redundant ctx lookup, improved UNAUTHORIZED mapping for OSCORE failures, integrated local-admin for non-protected LCI paths per auth framework
